chunks.text: Linux Login Server upgrades, Fri May 24 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Linux Login Server upgrades, Fri May 24 Beginning at about 3pm Friday, May 24, we will be upgrading the EECS Linux login servers lo

will be upgrading the EECS Linux login servers login.eecs, login-mfa.eecs, and setsecretkey.eecs, from RedHat Enterprise Linux 7 to RHEL 8. During the upgrade process, the servers will be unavailable for general logins, and will be rebooted multiple

for general logins, and will be rebooted multiple times. We anticipate that normal login service should be available by 9pm Friday evening. UPDATE [2024-05-24 | larsrohr ] This work was completed by 8:00pm. If you encounter any issues with your use

8:00pm. If you encounter any issues with your use of these unix login servers, please contact help@eecs. Resolved as of 2024-05-24 8:00pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service S
